title: [TEST ONLY] Docker overlay network not found during compose init
description: TEST ONLY publish gate HTML pass candidate with source-backed seed metadata.
error_signature: Error response from daemon: failed to set up container networking: overlay network not found
common_causes: Overlay network disappears between docker compose initialization steps on Docker Swarm.
quick_fix: Recreate the overlay network and rerun docker compose up.

title: [TEST ONLY] Azure OpenAI AAD bearer token returns 401 after SDK upgrade
description: TEST ONLY publish gate HTML pass candidate with source-backed seed metadata.
error_signature: AzureOpenAI with AAD bearer token passed via api_key returns 401 Unauthorized in 2.34.0
common_causes: Breaking SDK regression reported in openai/openai-python issue 3282.
quick_fix: Pin SDK version or update Azure auth configuration.
